card.name: Clear Blue
abilities: when you play this card, search your deck for a blue-jewel and move it to your hand. self-exile per P.5 — clear blue goes to EXILE on resolution, not GRAVEYARD.
while this card is in your graveyard, you may exile it to fill 1 hand-source slot of a spell you cast.
